summary: Added conservative paper-ID fallback inference for output-integrity source companion keys. When source_pdf metadata is absent, parseable paper IDs like 42summer19 now map to keys such as 9709_2019_June_42.
test_results: The new paper-inference test failed before implementation because source_companion was missing. After implementation, tests/test_audit.py passed: 10 passed, 5 warnings. The live output-integrity audit still failed on the expected 74 missing mark-scheme records, but grouped records now include inferred source companions such as 9709_2011_November_33 and 9709_2019_June_42. The targeted pytest bundle passed: 62 passed, 5 warnings.
acceptance_criteria_status: Satisfied: missing source metadata can be bridged from parseable canonical paper IDs.
Satisfied: inferred keys use the existing 9709_<year>_<session>_<component> format.
Satisfied: live missing mark-scheme groups no longer all have source_companion=missing.
repo_hygiene_notes: The live output-integrity audit report was written under iteration-05 in .agent-runs. No canonical output files were modified.
known_risks: The inference assumes canonical paper IDs use two-digit component + spring/summer/autumn/winter + two-digit year.
It does not prove the inferred companion PDF exists or should be allowed as missing.
